title: FAQ
a1: We offer same-day delivery for all orders placed before 2 PM. You can also schedule deliveries up to 3 days in advance.
a2: We carefully source high-quality organic products from the best local farms to ensure freshness and quality.
q3: What if I receive a damaged item?
a3: Please contact us within 24 hours with a photo of the product, and we will replace it or refund you immediately.
a4: Delivery fees vary depending on your location and may be free when reaching a certain order amount.
supportDesc: Our support team is available 24/7 to assist you.
